---
name: Event taxonomy request
about: Propose a new AFT event type or a change to an existing event type
title: "[Event Taxonomy]: "
labels: "event-taxonomy, proposal"
assignees: ""
---

## Proposed Event Type

Use uppercase snake case, for example `AGENT_EXAMPLE_EVENT`.

## Category

Payment, invoice, obligation, escrow, credit, security, fraud, dispute, reputation, certification, or other.

## Purpose

What financial trust fact does this event represent?

## Required Fields

List required fields.

## Optional Fields

List optional fields.

## Who May Emit This Event

Identify peer roles or issuers.

## Evidence Requirements

What receipts, credentials, hashes, proofs, or attestations are required?

## Privacy Classification

Public, private, restricted, or hash-only by default.

## Reputation Impact

How should reputation providers consider this event?

## Abuse Risks

Describe false-reporting, gaming, privacy, Sybil, or collusion risks.

## Related Existing Events

List similar or overlapping AFT events.
